title: Lucid Group, Inc. Common Stock (LCID) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Nasdaq's earnings page for LCID shows earnings calendar and consensus forecasts. Current consensus shows net losses through 2027 with revenue growth. Earnings surprise indicators track historical accuracy of Lucid's results versus expectations. Recent earnings have shown mix of beats and misses with net negative surprise trend. Analyst estimate revisions show downward bias following recent guidance suspension. The page provides quick reference for earnings expectations and historical surprise patterns.
